stage.subtitle_ar: خطواتك الأولى الواثقة مع الحاسوب: الملفات والمجلّدات، نظام التشغيل، والمهام اليومية التي ستحتاجينها كل يوم في تخصّصك.

content.intro_ar: في تخصّص التقنية ستتعاملين يوميًا مع عشرات الملفات: أكواد، وصور، ومستندات. تنظيمها داخل مجلّدات مهارة أساسية توفّر عليك وقتًا كبيرًا وتجعل عملك مرتّبًا. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين الكلمات الإنجليزية التي تصف الملفات والمجلّدات، وكيف تحفظينها وتنقلينها وتحذفينها بثقة.

vocab.meaning_en: a set of data saved on a computer
vocab.example: I save my work in a file.

vocab.meaning_en: a place that holds files
vocab.example: My photos are in one folder.

vocab.meaning_en: to keep your work on the computer
vocab.example: Save the file before you close it.

vocab.meaning_en: to look inside a file
vocab.example: Open the file to read it.

vocab.meaning_en: the word you give to a file
vocab.example: Give the file a clear name.

vocab.meaning_en: a file with text
vocab.example: I write my homework in a document.

vocab.meaning_en: a picture file
vocab.example: This image shows my project.

vocab.meaning_en: to remove a file from the computer
vocab.example: Delete the old file.

vocab.meaning_en: to make another one that is the same
vocab.example: Copy the file to a new folder.

vocab.meaning_en: to put a file in a new place
vocab.example: Move the file to the folder.

vocab.meaning_en: the main screen with icons
vocab.example: The file is on my desktop.

vocab.meaning_en: to get a file from the internet
vocab.example: I download a file from the internet.

paragraphs: On a computer, we keep our work in files. A file can be a document with text, or an image with a picture. Every file has a name. A good name is clear and short.
A folder is a place for files. We put many files in one folder. This keeps our work clean and easy to find. For example, I have one folder for school and one folder for photos.

We can do many things with a file. We open a file to read it. We save a file to keep our work. We can copy a file or move it to a new folder. We can also delete a file we do not need. Sometimes we download a file from the internet, and it goes to our computer.
My files are on my desktop and in my folders. When my work is clean, I feel happy. Good habits with files help me every day.

key_phrases.en: Move the file to a folder.

comprehension.question: What do we do to keep our work?
A document is a file with...
How do we get a file from the internet?

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about how you keep your files. Where do you save them?
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن كيفية حفظ ملفاتك. أين تحفظينها؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي على الأقل ٣ كلمات من كلمات الدرس مثل: file، folder، save.

content.intro_ar: نظام التشغيل هو قلب أي حاسوب، ومعرفتك بمصطلحاته بالإنجليزية ستفيدك كثيرًا في دراستك التقنية. في هذا الدرس ستتعرّفين على سطح المكتب والأيقونات والنوافذ والإعدادات بالإنجليزية، لتتنقّلي في أي حاسوب بثقة وتفهمي التعليمات التقنية بسهولة.

vocab.meaning_en: the main software that runs the computer
vocab.example: The operating system runs all your programs.

vocab.meaning_en: a popular operating system from Microsoft
vocab.example: Many computers use Windows.

vocab.meaning_en: the main screen you see first
vocab.example: My files are on the desktop.

vocab.meaning_en: a small picture you click to open something
vocab.example: Click the icon to open the program.

vocab.meaning_en: a bar that shows the open programs
vocab.example: The taskbar is at the bottom of the screen.

vocab.meaning_en: a box on the screen for a program
vocab.example: I have three windows open now.

vocab.meaning_en: a list of choices
vocab.example: Open the menu to see the options.

vocab.meaning_en: where you change how the computer works
vocab.example: Change the language in the settings.

vocab.meaning_en: a device to move the pointer and click
vocab.example: Use the mouse to point and click.

vocab.meaning_en: the part you use to type letters and numbers
vocab.example: I type my name on the keyboard.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that shows pictures and text
vocab.example: The screen shows my desktop.

vocab.meaning_en: to press the mouse button
vocab.example: Click the icon two times to open it.

paragraphs: Every computer needs an operating system. It is the main software that makes the computer work. Windows is one popular operating system, and there are others like macOS and Linux. Without it, the machine cannot run your programs.

When you turn on the computer, you see the desktop. The desktop is the main screen. It has small pictures called icons. When you click an icon with the mouse, a program opens in a window. You can have many windows open at the same time.

At the bottom of the screen, there is a taskbar. It shows the programs that are open. Many programs have a menu, which is a list of choices. You use the keyboard to type and the mouse to point and click.
If you want to change something, you open the settings. There you can change the language, the time, or the background. Learning the operating system helps you use any computer with confidence.

comprehension.question: What is an operating system?
options: The main software that runs the computer
A small picture on the screen
comprehension.correct: The main software that runs the computer
comprehension.explanation_ar: نظام التشغيل هو البرنامج الرئيسي الذي يُشغّل الحاسوب.

comprehension.question: What do you see when you turn on the computer?
comprehension.explanation_ar: عند تشغيل الحاسوب ترين سطح المكتب أولًا.

comprehension.question: What is an icon?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الأيقونة صورة صغيرة تنقرين عليها لفتح برنامج.

comprehension.question: Where can you change the language or the time?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يمكنك تغيير اللغة أو الوقت من الإعدادات.

task.prompt_en: Describe your computer's desktop. What icons do you see? Which operating system do you use?
task.prompt_ar: صِفي سطح مكتب حاسوبك. ما الأيقونات التي ترينها؟ وما نظام التشغيل الذي تستخدمينه؟
task.guidance_ar: تحدّثي لنحو نصف دقيقة، واستخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل: desktop، icon، settings.

content.intro_ar: كل يوم نؤدّي مهامّ صغيرة على الحاسوب: تسجيل الدخول، وكتابة رسالة، والبحث عن معلومة. إتقانك لهذه المهام بالإنجليزية سيجعلك أسرع وأكثر ثقة في دراستك التقنية وعملك المستقبلي. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين مفردات وعبارات هذه المهام اليومية وتتدرّبين عليها.

vocab.meaning_en: to write using the keyboard
vocab.example: I type my report on the keyboard.

vocab.meaning_en: to put text or images on paper
vocab.example: Please print this document.

vocab.meaning_en: to add a new program to the computer
vocab.example: I install a new program to edit photos.

vocab.meaning_en: to make a program newer and better
vocab.example: The computer asks me to update the app.

vocab.meaning_en: a secret word you use to log in
vocab.example: Keep your password safe and secret.

vocab.meaning_en: to enter your account
vocab.example: I log in with my name and password.

vocab.meaning_en: a program that opens websites
vocab.example: I open a browser to read the news.

vocab.meaning_en: a message you send on the internet
vocab.example: I send an email to my teacher.

vocab.meaning_en: to add a file to an email
vocab.example: Attach the file to the email.

vocab.meaning_en: to look for something
vocab.example: I search for information online.

vocab.meaning_en: a fast way to do a task
vocab.example: This shortcut saves the file quickly.

vocab.meaning_en: to turn the computer off and on again
vocab.example: Restart the computer if it is slow.

paragraphs: We use a computer for many small tasks every day. First, we log in with a username and a password. The password is secret, so we keep it safe and never share it.

After we log in, we can start our work. We type reports on the keyboard and print them on paper. We open a browser to visit websites and search for information. We also send an email to friends or teachers, and we can attach a file to it.

Sometimes the computer asks us to update a program to a newer version. We may also install a new program that we need. A good tip is to learn a shortcut, which is a fast way to do a task. For example, one shortcut can save a file quickly.
If the computer is slow or a program stops, we can restart it. These small tasks are simple, but they are very useful. When you know them well in English, you can help other people too.

key_phrases.en: Attach the file to the email.

comprehension.question: What do we use to log in?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نسجّل الدخول باسم المستخدم وكلمة المرور.

comprehension.question: What does "attach" mean in an email?
options: To add a file to the email
comprehension.correct: To add a file to the email
comprehension.explanation_ar: الإرفاق يعني إضافة ملف إلى البريد.

comprehension.question: Why do we keep a password safe?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نحافظ على كلمة المرور لأنها سرّية.

comprehension.question: What can we do if a program stops?
comprehension.explanation_ar: إذا توقّف برنامج يمكننا إعادة تشغيل الحاسوب.

comprehension.question: What is a shortcut?
options: A fast way to do a task
comprehension.correct: A fast way to do a task

comprehension.question: What do we use a browser for?

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about the tasks you do on a computer every day.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن المهام التي تقومين بها على الحاسوب كل يوم.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي على الأقل ٣ كلمات من كلمات الدرس مثل: log in، email، search.
